Language:Python3 (PyPy3)

#1ACCEPTED0.04 sdetails
#2ACCEPTED0.04 sdetails

Code

n = int(input())
result = [n]
while n != 1:
    if n % 2 == 0:
        n //= 2
    else:
        n = 3 * n + 1
    result.append(n)
print(*result)
